message:
fix(passes): Fix class method mutation detection key format mismatch

The mutation analysis was storing results using "ClassName.method_name"
format but lookups were using just "method_name", causing mutations to
not be detected for class methods.

Changes:
- isVarMutated, isVarAugAssigned, isVarUnused now use proper class.method
  key format when looking up mutations for class methods
- Added "return self" detection - methods returning self now mark
  mutates_self=true so they get *@This() instead of *const @This()
- Fixed @This() usage for class self-references in misc.zig

This fixes test_augassign which had "cannot assign to constant" errors
for variables with augmented assignments (x += 1), and fixes
"cast discards const qualifier" errors for __iadd__ and similar methods.
